faq.question: Is Smudgy client safe?
faq.answer: Yes, Smudgy client is safe because it's open source, has been helped on by many users, and is used by many users.

faq.question: Does this client use my token?
faq.answer: Yes, we use your token for API calling only for the official Kirka API.

faq.question: Can I have a custom badge?
faq.answer: No, they are given out at random or from giveaways. If you ask, you will be blacklisted.

faq.question: Will I get banned for using Smudgy client?
faq.answer: Not that I'm aware of. If Xip flags something, I will take action.
